next_focus: Production is technically available. Smoke data isolation is deployed: analytics and public winners exclude the synthetic production smoke participant, the guarded smoke:production-safe runner is available, catalog readiness remains green, and notification storage has no smoke outbound rows. Continue read-only readiness/journey monitoring before any further mutating smoke runs.
follow_ups: Use a unique image tag or no-cache build when deploying uncommitted remote changes; reusing the git short SHA tag can leave Kubernetes on stale image content.
